THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONICO, SALVADOR MAURICIO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HOLLAND, ERIC HOLLAND, JEREMY COGAN, JESSICA (NOTHING IN THIS JUDGMENT SHALL AFFECT PLAINTIFFS'RIGHT TO COMPENSATION FOR BENEFITS IN CONNECTION WITH ELLIS ACT EVICTION) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SC-105A: ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER--- "PLAINTIFF IS NOT ENTITLED TO APPEAL THE JUDGMENT. THE REQUEST DOES NOT ESTABLISH GROUNDS FOR RECONSIDERATION OF THE JUDGMENT.
